title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition
summary: More intelligence from every token, stronger performance per dollar, and more capability on demand for your hardest work.
title_es: OpenAI presenta GPT-5.6 con mayor inteligencia por token
bajada: OpenAI lanzó GPT-5.6, su nueva familia de modelos que promete mejor rendimiento por dólar y mayor capacidad. El modelo mejora en áreas como ciberseguridad y se integra como modelo preferido en Microsoft 365 Copilot.
bajada_en: OpenAI launched GPT-5.6, its new model family promising better performance per dollar and increased capabilities. The model improves in areas like cybersecurity and becomes the preferred model for Microsoft 365 Copilot.

title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
summary: OpenAI's latest family of models promises improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.
title_es: ChatGPT Work: agente de IA que gestiona proyectos completos
bajada: OpenAI presentó ChatGPT Work, un agente de IA que puede actuar en aplicaciones y archivos del usuario, mantener sesiones largas y convertir objetivos en trabajo terminado. Marca un movimiento hacia sistemas más autónomos y productivos.
bajada_en: OpenAI introduced ChatGPT Work, an AI agent that can take action across apps and files, maintain long sessions, and turn goals into finished work. It marks a shift toward more autonomous and productive systems.

title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
summary: Learn how GPT-5.6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work.
title_es: Anthropic descubre un espacio oculto en el funcionamiento de Claude
bajada: Investigadores de Anthropic desarrollaron la Jacobian lens, una herramienta que ofrece la visión más clara hasta ahora de qué ocurre internamente en los modelos de lenguaje grandes. El hallazgo va desde lo mundano hasta lo inquietante.
bajada_en: Anthropic researchers developed the Jacobian lens, a tool providing the clearest view yet into what happens inside large language models. The discovery ranges from mundane to unsettling findings.

title: ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
summary: ChatGPT Work is an agent that can take action across your apps and files, stay with a project for hours if needed, and turn a goal into finished work.
title_es: Lyzr recaudó $100M usando su propio agente de IA
bajada: La startup Lyzr, que desarrolla agentes de IA empresariales, utilizó su propio agente para gestionar una ronda de financiamiento de $100 millones. Demuestra la madurez de las tecnologías de agentes en aplicaciones reales.
bajada_en: Lyzr, an enterprise AI agent startup, used its own AI agent to manage a $100 million fundraising round. It demonstrates the maturity of agent technologies in real-world applications.

title: Anthropic found a hidden space where Claude puzzles over concepts
summary: The AI firm Anthropic has developed a technique that has given it the clearest glimpse yet at what’s really going on inside large language models as they answer questions or carry out tasks. title_es: Fidji Simo se retira del puesto de número 2 en OpenAI
bajada: Fidji Simo, ejecutiva de OpenAI, abandonó su rol de tiempo completo como jefa de trabajo en AGI tras licencia médica prolongada. Ocurre en momento crítico con potencial IPO y competencia empresarial con Anthropic.
bajada_en: Fidji Simo, OpenAI's No. 2 executive, stepped down from her full-time AGI role after extended medical leave. It happens at a critical time with potential IPO and enterprise competition with Anthropic.

title_es: Deutsche Telekom transforma telecomunicaciones con IA de OpenAI
bajada: Deutsche Telekom adopta IA de OpenAI para convertirse en operadora nativa en IA, mejorando servicio al cliente, flujos de empleados y operaciones de red. Caso de uso empresarial en industria crítica de infraestructura.
bajada_en: Deutsche Telekom adopts OpenAI's AI to become an AI-native telecom operator, improving customer service, employee workflows, and network operations. A critical infrastructure industry use case.

title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
summary: Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.
title_es: AgentLens: benchmark abierto para evaluar agentes de código
bajada: Investigadores publicaron AgentLens, un benchmark de código abierto que evalúa agentes de código interactivos más allá del simple aprobado/reprobado. Incluye evaluación de trayectoria completa con verificación formal y análisis de LLM.
bajada_en: Researchers released AgentLens, an open-source benchmark that evaluates interactive code agents beyond pass/fail. It includes full trajectory evaluation with formal verification and LLM analysis.

title: Fidji Simo steps down from leading OpenAI’s AGI work due to illness
summary: OpenAI's Fidji Simo is departing her full-time role as the company's AGI chief and is transitioning to being a "part-time advisor," she said on X. The news follows Simo's original announcement in April that she would take a few weeks of medical leave due to a neuroimmune condition, shortly after she had taken on the […]

title: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
summary: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.

title: AgentLens: Production-Assessed Trajectory Reviews for Coding Agent Evaluation
summary:
arXiv:2607.06624v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: We present AgentLens, a production-assessed benchmark for interactive code agents. Most code-agent benchmarks reduce a run to a single bit -- did the task pass? -- but the people who actually use these agents experience the entire trajectory: how the agent follows instructions, uses its tools, verifies its own work, recovers from mistakes, and talks to them along the way. AgentLens evaluates that whole trajectory. It pairs formal verification, where an objective check exists, with LLM-written trajectory reviews and side-by-side comparisons, so that each run yields a readable explanation of why the score is what it is. This makes AgentLens useful for more than ranking models: we use it to diagnose model behavior, compare successive versions of our own agent, and catch product regressions in a nightly evaluation pipeline. We release the benchmark as open source at https://github.com/agent-lens/agent-lens-bench.
title_es: AgentLens: Production-Assessed Trajectory Reviews for Coding Agent Evaluation

title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
summary: OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.
title_es: OpenAI cierra Atlas pero continúa con ambiciones en navegadores
bajada: OpenAI está descontinuando su navegador con IA después de menos de un año, pero trasladará características de navegación agentiva a su app de escritorio y una extensión de Chrome. Señala un cambio en la estrategia de distribución.
bajada_en: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year, but moving agentic browsing features to its desktop app and Chrome extension. It signals a shift in distribution strategy.

title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
summary: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.
title_es: EPFL crea videos de IA para estimular regiones cerebrales
bajada: Investigadores del proyecto NEVO en EPFL desarrollaron método para generar videos con IA optimizados para activar regiones cerebrales específicas. Avance en neurociencia computacional con aplicaciones potenciales en investigación neurológica.
bajada_en: EPFL's NEVO project developed a method to generate AI videos optimized to activate specific brain regions. An advance in computational neuroscience with potential neurological research applications.

title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s No. 2 role
summary: OpenAI's No. 2 executive, Fidji Simo, is stepping down from her full-time role after her medical leave proved longer than expected — a leadership vacuum that comes at a tricky time as the company eyes a possible IPO and races to catch Anthropic in the enterprise market.
title_es: Sunrun lanza centros de datos de IA distribuidos en hogares
bajada: La empresa de energía solar Sunrun expande hacia centros de datos de IA con modelo innovador: pagará clientes por alojar nodos de cómputo en sus hogares. Plantea preguntas sobre distribución de infraestructura de IA.
bajada_en: Solar company Sunrun expands into AI data centers with an innovative model: paying customers to host compute nodes in their homes. It raises questions about distributed AI infrastructure.
